allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add blog section, Foundations content, and UI polish

- Add Foundations blog section with 5 deep learning posts
- Integrate react-markdown with KaTeX and syntax highlighting
- Obsidian-style markdown rendering with EB Garamond headings
- Add real resources \(papers, tutorials, GitHub repo\)
- Fix blog page background to use landing page grid
- Reduce mobile h1 size for better readability
- Remove duplicate headings and meta tags from blog pages
EOF
\)")
